message:
chore(beads): close bd-32e.6 — TSM E2E pipeline integration tests completed

- Issue bd-32e.6 (TSM: E2E tests - full pipeline integration under load)
  transitioned from open to closed, assigned to RusticWolf
- Notes updated with summary: 21 E2E tests covering null/foreign ptr
  detection, lifecycle validation, double-free handling, concurrent access
  (4+8 threads), latency budget enforcement, deterministic mixed workload,
  TLS cache behavior, and metrics collection
- Close timestamp set to 2026-03-13T19:48:58Z

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -297,7 +297,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-32e.3","title":"TSM: Region state lattice implementation","description":"Implement region state lattice: Valid > Readable > Writable > Quarantined > Freed > Invalid > Unknown. States must only move toward more restrictive (monotone safety). Lattice join must be idempotent. Log level: INFO for state transitions, WARN for attempted non-monotone transitions.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:59:29.710816461Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T05:45:41.173640552Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T05:45:41.173628479Z","close_reason":"Completed lattice absorption-law regression coverage + rch validation evidence","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenlibc","lattice","tsm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-32e.3","depends_on_id":"bd-32e","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":929,"issue_id":"bd-32e.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"test no-db","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:45:26Z"},{"id":930,"issue_id":"bd-32e.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Slice update (CopperCliff)

Implemented for `bd-32e.3`:
- Added deterministic absorption-law regression coverage in `crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/lattice.rs` via new test `absorption_laws_hold`:
  - `a.join(a.meet(b)) == a`
  - `a.meet(a.join(b)) == a`
- This extends lattice verification beyond commutative/associative/idempotent checks and guards the algebra contract across all `SafetyState` pairs.

Verification (`rch exec -- ...`):
1) `cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane lattice::tests:: -- --nocapture`
- PASS (`13 passed`, includes new absorption test).
2) `cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-membrane --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- PASS.","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:45:34Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-32e.4","title":"TSM: Self-healing action dispatch (hardened mode)","description":"Implement self-healing actions for hardened mode: ClampSize, TruncateWithNull, IgnoreDoubleFree, IgnoreForeignFree, ReallocAsMalloc, ReturnSafeDefault, UpgradeToSafeVariant. Every repair must emit structured JSON evidence. Log level: INFO for each repair, WARN for escalated repairs.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CopperCliff","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:59:29.793378085Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T05:54:59.690884258Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T05:54:59.690819446Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenlibc","hardened","self-healing","tsm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-32e.4","depends_on_id":"bd-32e","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":931,"issue_id":"bd-32e.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"CopperCliff claiming bd-32e.4. Scope: implement/verify hardened self-healing action dispatch evidence emission + targeted tests in membrane. Will validate via rch (check/clippy/tests) and post artifact commands/results before close.","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:47:44Z"},{"id":932,"issue_id":"bd-32e.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented `bd-32e.4` self-healing dispatch evidence slice in `crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/heal.rs`.

What landed:
- Added structured healing JSONL evidence emission on `HealingPolicy::record` for all non-`None` actions.
- Added severity mapping:
  - `warn`: `ReturnSafeDefault`, `UpgradeToSafeVariant` (escalated repairs)
  - `info`: all other healing actions.
- Added bounded ring-buffered evidence channel with deterministic fields:
  - `trace_id`, `decision_id`, `bead_id`, `runtime_mode`, `level`, `api_family`, `decision_path`, `outcome`, `healing_action`, `escalated`, `details`.
- Added API controls for evidence handling:
  - `set_healing_logging_enabled`, `clear_healing_logs`, `export_healing_log_jsonl`.
- Switched global policy singleton to `LazyLock<HealingPolicy>` to support non-const initialization cleanly.

Tests added:
- `healing_log_export_contains_required_fields`
- `escalated_healing_actions_emit_warn_level`
- `none_action_does_not_emit_healing_log_row`
- `healing_log_capacity_is_bounded`
- `every_healing_action_variant_emits_dispatch_evidence`

Validation via `rch`:
- `rch exec -- cargo fmt --manifest-path crates/frankenlibc-membrane/Cargo.toml`
- `rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-membrane --all-targets` ✅
- `rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-membrane --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✅
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane heal::tests:: -- --nocapture` ✅ (`14 passed; 0 failed`)

Note: workspace still has pre-existing unrelated dirty files and known non-slice lint/test debt outside this bead.
","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:54:57Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-32e.5","title":"TSM: Unit tests - validation pipeline stages","description":"Unit tests for each TSM validation pipeline stage in isolation: null-check correctness, TLS cache hit/miss/eviction, bloom filter false-positive rate bounds, arena lookup accuracy, fingerprint verification, canary integrity, bounds enforcement. Must include property-based tests (proptest) for pipeline composition. Must verify early-exit behavior and structured trace emission.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CopperCliff","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:59:29.877073573Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T06:57:54.962254784Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T06:57:54.962185674Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenlibc","test","tsm","unit-test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-32e.5","depends_on_id":"bd-32e","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-32e.5","depends_on_id":"bd-32e.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-32e.5","depends_on_id":"bd-32e.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-32e.5","depends_on_id":"bd-32e.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":933,"issue_id":"bd-32e.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"CopperCliff claiming bd-32e.5 for focused unit-test closure: per-stage pipeline tests + property-based composition checks + structured trace verification with rch validation.","created_at":"2026-02-25T06:43:59Z"},{"id":934,"issue_id":"bd-32e.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed targeted pipeline-stage unit-test closure for ptr validator. Added proptest dev-dependency in crates/frankenlibc-membrane/Cargo.toml and added stage/early-exit/property tests in crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/ptr_validator.rs (null early-exit stage set, foreign early-exit deep-stage skip, bloom false-positive non-ownership, dependency-safe-order proptest invariants and idempotence). Fixed assertion contract: null fast-exit should NOT emit stage=safety_level (that stage is only emitted on validation bypass path). Validation via rch: cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane ptr_validator::tests:: -- --nocapture PASS (20 passed); cargo check --workspace --all-targets PASS. Workspace-wide gates currently blocked by pre-existing unrelated issues: cargo fmt --check reports diffs in crates/frankenlibc-core/src/string/regex.rs; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings fails on existing frankenlibc-core regex warnings/lints unrelated to this bead.","created_at":"2026-02-25T06:57:50Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-32e.7","title":"TSM: Logging specification - structured trace + evidence emission","description":"Define and enforce logging specification for TSM: TRACE for per-stage pipeline decisions, DEBUG for cache hit/miss rates and bloom filter stats, INFO for state transitions and repair actions, WARN for non-monotone transition attempts and budget overruns, ERROR for invariant violations. All log records must include trace_id + decision_id fields. Cardinality budget for metrics labels.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"MagentaFalcon","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:59:30.048960293Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T06:10:47.646871227Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T06:10:47.646790505Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenlibc","logging","observability","tsm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-32e.7","depends_on_id":"bd-32e","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":935,"issue_id":"bd-32e.7","author":"MagentaFalcon","text":"2026-02-25 progress (MagentaFalcon): implemented structured TSM validation logging in crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/ptr_validator.rs. Added ValidationTraceContext + per-decision IDs, JSONL export, level mapping (trace/debug/info/warn/error), stage path emission, terminal transition logs, and strict/hardened budget warnings (20ns/200ns). Added tests: validation_log_export_includes_trace_and_decision_ids, validation_logging_level_mapping_covers_spec_levels, validation_logging_cardinality_budget_is_bounded. Also ensured canary corruption path bumps TLS cache epoch for deterministic revalidation. Verification (all CPU-intensive runs offloaded with rch): rch exec -- rustfmt --check crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/ptr_validator.rs (pass); rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-membrane --all-targets (pass); rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-membrane --all-targets -- -D warnings (pass); rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane ptr_validator -- --nocapture (pass, 14 tests). Workspace gates: rch exec -- cargo fmt --check failed on pre-existing unrelated formatting in crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/string_abi.rs; rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings failed on pre-existing unrelated frankenlibc-abi warnings/errors. Artifact refs: crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/ptr_validator.rs; test names above.","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:43:59Z"},{"id":936,"issue_id":"bd-32e.7","author":"MagentaFalcon","text":"2026-02-25 completion extension (MagentaFalcon): extended TSM logging coverage beyond ptr_validator into runtime-math export + runtime-policy mode events to satisfy full trace/evidence spec with trace_id/decision_id continuity. Added in crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/runtime_math/mod.rs: runtime_mode_dispatch (trace), runtime_evidence_emitted (info), runtime_calibration with snapshot_capture_latency_ns + snapshot_validated_field_count (debug), runtime_snapshot (info), runtime_snapshot_field_out_of_range (warn), runtime_certificate_verification_failed (error), and related alert rows. Added in crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/runtime_policy.rs: bounded mode-event JSONL with startup selection info, immutable mode-switch attempt error, env-unavailable warn, and resolution error/race/reentry events, plus thread-local mode caching for zero-cost reads after startup resolution. Validation (rch): cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --all-targets (pass); cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi mode_ -- --nocapture (pass); cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane runtime_math_log_jsonl_export_contains_required_runtime_decision_fields -- --nocapture (pass); cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane snapshot_range_violations_identify_out_of_contract_fields -- --nocapture (pass). Remaining fmt/clippy full-gate failures are pre-existing unrelated workspace debt. Artifact refs: crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/ptr_validator.rs; crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/runtime_math/mod.rs; crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/runtime_policy.rs","created_at":"2026-02-25T06:10:43Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-33p","title":"Evidence/logging unification v2: schema, joins, and artifact index integrity","description":"Background:
- Existing logging contracts are solid, but closure quality depends on consistent evidence across unit/e2e/perf/release workflows.

Goal:
- Ensure one canonical structured evidence schema is emitted by all verification surfaces and can be machine-joined across artifacts.

Deliverables:
1) Unified schema profile for unit/e2e/perf/release events.
2) Cross-artifact correlation keys (trace_id, bead_id/work-item, mode, api_family/symbol).
3) Artifact index verifier ensuring every failed test points to concrete diagnostics.
4) CI gate that validates schema conformance and required field completeness.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Every failing path in CI emits parseable evidence with linkable artifacts.
- Schema validator catches missing/invalid fields deterministically.
- Downstream reports can aggregate by trace_id without lossy joins.

Test and Logging Requirements:
- Unit tests for schema serialization/validation and index generation.
- E2E tests that intentionally trigger representative failures and verify evidence completeness.
- Mandatory detailed logs for both success and failure paths.

Alien-artifact Explainability Requirements:
- Evidence records must support decision explainability (which controller/gate/action and why), not just pass/fail telemetry.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"AmberStone","created_at":"2026-02-12T14:59:34.435007918Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T09:28:54.734491835Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T09:28:54.734471547Z","close_reason":"All child deliverables validated; structured-log fixture/gate regression fixed and evidence compliance/tests passing.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critique","diagnostics","logging","verification"],"comments":[{"id":937,"issue_id":"bd-33p","author":"AmberStone","text":"Closure audit (AmberStone, 2026-02-13): parent `bd-33p` revalidation uncovered and resolved a real schema-gate regression.

Issue found:
- `bash scripts/check_structured_logs.sh` failed because it validated intentionally-negative parser fixtures (`tests/gentoo/fixtures/sample_logs/invalid_*.jsonl`) as if they were required-valid logs.
- Also, the "valid" sample fixtures were missing schema-required fields (`trace_id`, `level`, and in runtime fixture explicit `timestamp` field where only legacy `ts` was present).

Fix applied:
1. Updated `scripts/check_structured_logs.sh` to skip only negative fixture files under `tests/gentoo/fixtures/sample_logs/invalid_*.jsonl`.
2. Updated valid fixtures to satisfy structured-log required fields while preserving parser semantics:
   - `tests/gentoo/fixtures/sample_logs/valid_runtime.jsonl`
   - `tests/gentoo/fixtures/sample_logs/valid_hook.jsonl`

Verification (all PASS):
1. `bash scripts/check_structured_logs.sh`
2. `bash scripts/check_evidence_compliance.sh`
3. `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/cargo-target-codex-harness cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test structured_log_test --test evidence_compliance_test`
4. `python3 -m unittest tests/gentoo/test_log_parser.py -q`

Result: schema/join/compliance gates are green with deterministic handling of negative fixtures and updated valid sample logs.
","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:28:49Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-33p.1","title":"Canonical evidence schema v2 for unit/conformance/e2e/perf/release","description":"Background:
- Evidence currently exists across many surfaces, but closure needs one canonical schema.

Scope:
- Define schema v2 that unifies unit/e2e/conformance/perf/release events.
- Require consistent keys for cross-join (`trace_id`, `mode`, `symbol`, `bead_id`, `artifact_ref`).

Deliverables:
1) Schema profile with required/optional fields and enums.
2) Versioning + backward-compatibility policy.
3) Compliance checklist for all emitters.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Every gate output validates against schema v2.
- Consumers can aggregate without lossy ad-hoc transforms.

Rationale:
- Makes evidence queryable and supports deterministic triage.

Testing/Logging:
- Unit tests for serialization/validation across event types.
- E2E validation pass on sample gate outputs.
